attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_FND_USER)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_FND_USER.USER_ID, STG_CSF_FND_USER.USER_NAME, STG_CSF_FND_USER.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_FND_USER.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_FND_USER.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_FND_USER.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_FND_USER.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_FND_USER.ENCRYPTED_FOUNDATION_PASSWORD, STG_CSF_FND_USER.ENCRYPTED_USER_PASSWORD, STG_CSF_FND_USER.SESSION_NUMBER, STG_CSF_FND_USER.START_DATE, STG_CSF_FND_USER.END_DATE, STG_CSF_FND_USER.DESCRIPTION, STG_CSF_FND_USER.LAST_LOGON_DATE, STG_CSF_FND_USER.PASSWORD_DATE, STG_CSF_FND_USER.PASSWORD_ACCESSES_LEFT, STG_CSF_FND_USER.PASSWORD_LIFESPAN_ACCESSES, STG_CSF_FND_USER.PASSWORD_LIFESPAN_DAYS, STG_CSF_FND_USER.EMPLOYEE_ID, STG_CSF_FND_USER.EMAIL_ADDRESS, STG_CSF_FND_USER.FAX, STG_CSF_FND_USER.CUSTOMER_ID, STG_CSF_FND_USER.SUPPLIER_ID, STG_CSF_FND_USER.WEB_PASSWORD, STG_CSF_FND_USER.USER_GUID, STG_CSF_FND_USER.GCN_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, STG_CSF_FND_USER.PERSON_PARTY_ID, STG_CSF_FND_USER.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_FND_USER.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_FND_USER.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_FND_USER.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_FND_USER STG_CSF_FND_USER,
 (
 select USER_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_FND_USER
 minus
 select USER_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_FND_USER
 ) ACM 
 where 
 ACM.USER_ID = STG_CSF_FND_USER.USER_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_FND_USER.REFRESH_DATETIME
